description: Error response envelope returned when a request fails.

code.description: The HTTP status code of the error.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

constraintViolations.description: A list of constraint violations for validation errors (HTTP 400).

items.description: Details of a single constraint violation in a request.

path.description: The JSON path to the field that caused the violation.

message.description: A description of the constraint violation.

parameterLocation.description: The location of the violating parameter (QUERY, PATH, BODY).

location.description: The location detail for the violation.

title: ErrorEnvelope
